code: import React from'react';import{Link,useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useCart}from'../context/CartContext';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import ProductCard from'../components/ProductCard/ProductCard';import'./WishlistPage.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const WishlistPage=()=>{const{wishlistItems}=useCart();const{user}=useAuth();const navigate=useNavigate();if(!user)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wishlist-empty",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:72},children:"\uD83E\uDD0D"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Please login to see your wishlist"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>navigate('/auth'),className:"wishlist-login-btn",children:"Login"})]});if(wishlistItems.length===0)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wishlist-empty",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:72},children:"\uD83E\uDD0D"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Your wishlist is empty"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Save items you want to buy later"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/",className:"wishlist-login-btn",children:"Shop Now"})]});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"wishlist-page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wishlist-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h1",{className:"wishlist-title",children:["My Wishlist (",wishlistItems.length,")"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"wishlist-grid",children:wishlistItems.map(item=>item.products&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ProductCard,{product:item.products},item.id))})]})});};export default WishlistPage;
